steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no dependencies (write-library, t0010 is independent).

steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure including assets/library/.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Read t0007 TRAJECTORY_RECORD_FIELDS schema and t0006 scope-aware library, plus relevant papers.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: deterministic mismatch wrapper, no external research needed.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Skipped: t0007/t0006 library code is reviewed in research-papers; no other prior code is required.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design MatchedMismatchAgent API, mismatch strategies, delegate handling, test plan.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement matched_mismatch.py, library asset, and pytest suite.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: write-library task; not an experiment.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json, etc.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: write-library task; no quantitative metrics to compare.

steps.name: suggestions

steps.name: reporting
